name: fai-slack-plugin
description: Slack integration plugin for FAI — 4 MCP tools, dedicated agent, compatible plays

tools.name: slack_message_send
tools.description: Send a message to a Slack channel or user with rich formatting and attachments

tools.name: slack_channel_create
tools.description: Create a Slack channel with topic, purpose, and initial members

tools.name: slack_thread_reply
tools.description: Reply in a Slack thread with context-aware AI-generated response

tools.name: slack_user_notify
tools.description: Send a direct notification to a Slack user with priority and action buttons
